content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be rearchitected to gate curiosity-driven exploration via hierarchical separation of "surprise novelty" (tracked via RND/ICM prediction errors) and "actionable novelty" (stored as episodic memory entries for future active learning queries). This creates a curious active agent that only prioritizes exploring unknowns that fill gaps in its existing memory, rather than wasting compute on random surprising but uninformative distractions.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
